case_title: ELIA VARGAS VS. RMH PARTNERSHIP, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARGAS, ELIA AS TO DEFENDANT RMH PARTNERSHIP, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA ON THE CORNER CAFE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
